description_long: This rifle features a striking visual design with a predominantly tan and brown color scheme, accented by a bold red-and-white striped folding stock. The body of the rifle is decorated with tiger-like stripes and a white emblem, giving it a distinctive, almost custom-painted appearance. The handguard and receiver are boxy and robust, with visible screws and panel lines suggesting a modular construction. The grip and magazine area are textured, likely for improved handling, and the barrel is relatively short, ending in a dark muzzle. The stock is skeletonized and appears lightweight, further highlighted by its candy-cane striping. Overall, the rifle combines utilitarian firearm features with unique, eye-catching aesthetics suitable for urban environments.
description: A tan and brown rifle with tiger-stripe patterns, a red-and-white striped folding stock, and a compact, boxy build with textured grip and dark muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel and striped stock.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full tiger-stripe pattern, white emblem, and the red-and-white striped folding stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the striped stock and the back of the receiver, with minimal detail on the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same tiger-stripe motif, stock, and grip details as the other side.
